description: Blinkit has cut delivery fees to Rs0 for all orders above Rs99 in Delhi and Gurgaon, effective immediately
raw_evidence: Blinkit announces Zero Fee Delhi campaign: free delivery on orders >= Rs99 starting March 2026, targeting SwiftMart core market

description: Zepto app experiencing widespread crashes and delivery failures in Bangalore, rating dropped from 4.2 to 3.5 in 2 weeks
raw_evidence: 500+ recent 1-star reviews citing app crashes on checkout, order cancelled without refund, and 45-min delays on 10-min promise in Bangalore

description: Zomato is hiring 30+ delivery operations managers and city launch specialists specifically for Pune, suggesting imminent Pune quick-commerce entry
raw_evidence: Zomato job postings: City Launch Manager Pune, Operations Head Pune Blinkit, Supply Chain Lead West Maharashtra, all posted within 7 days

description: Swiggy Instamart raises Instamart Plus subscription from Rs99 to Rs179/month, creating a pricing gap that SwiftPass (Rs149/month) can exploit
raw_evidence: Swiggy announces Instamart Plus price hike: Rs99/month to Rs179/month from April 2026, citing operational cost normalisation. User backlash visible on Twitter/X.
